hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(jsx?|tsx?)$" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(test|spec)\.(jsx?|tsx?)$" && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "src/(features|components|hooks|services|lib|stores)/"; then echo "[test-writer reminder] A source file was created or modified: $FILE — Consider using the test-writer agent to generate tests for this file."; fi'
